The '''''Aken''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] active during the early days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
Its first mission was to transport [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] himself from [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. While the ship approached Geonosis through the planet's asteroid field to remain hidden for the planetary radars, it was discovered by [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture'' droid starfighters]]. Fortunately, [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] were close to its position. The two [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighters]] and the transport ship were pushed to the limit trying to fend off squadrons of droid and [[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian starfighters]], as well as a fleet of [[Lupus-class missile frigate|''Lupus''-class missile frigates]]. Eventually, they succeeded, and the ''Aken'' was the first [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] assault ship to land on Geonosian soil.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
